generated_oml:
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.org/DTDFVocab"
namespace base = "http://example.org/base"

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity implemented as ROS2 package hosting Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking functionality",
    base:isContainedIn ADASVehicleSystem
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity implemented as ROS2 package for computation offloading and real-time monitoring",
    base:isContainedIn ADASVehicleSystem
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity implemented as ROS2 package for operator and developer interaction",
    base:isContainedIn ADASVehicleSystem
]

instance ADASVehicleSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale teleoperated autonomous vehicle operating in ADAS domain for safety-critical Adaptive Cruise Control systems",
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity
]

instance SystemUnderStudy : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment ADASVehicleSystem
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state"
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPath : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected driving path based on sensor data"
]

instance DetectedObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected object tracks from LiDAR point cloud processing"
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "providing real-time vehicle state visualization, projected driving path, and detected object tracks via UI with data reporting capabilities",
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization, ProjectedDrivingPath, DetectedObjectTracks
]

instance TransferACCProcessing : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC processing tasks to cloud resources",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "transferring ACC system processing (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation, and actuation commands) to cloud-based resources",
    DTDFVocab:provides TransferACCProcessing
]

instance EnableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enabling Adaptive Cruise Control system remotely",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disabling Adaptive Cruise Control system remotely",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AdjustSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting set speed for Adaptive Cruise Control remotely",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrake : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggering emergency braking remotely",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "enabling remote ACC control (enable/disable, speed adjustment, emergency braking)",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACC, DisableACC, AdjustSpeed, EmergencyBrake
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from the Controlling FE are processed by the Data Translation component for serialization and message alignment, then transmitted over ROS2 for internal software components and Wi-Fi UDP for inter-entity communication to physical actuators including Motor and Steering Servo."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Devices require 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for computation offloading in safety-critical vehicular applications, as mandated by standards, with hardware limitations necessitating this specific latency."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Architecture based on ISO 23247 RA, mapping software components to Functional Entities implemented as ROS2 packages; entities (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User) organized by entity-based structure with each deployed on distinct hardware, though Physical Twin Entity extends beyond standard OME to include general automotive functionality like Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs within a ROS2 network, while inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi with UDP transport layer protocol."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247 standard for Digital twin framework for manufacturing, which includes four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture (Part 2), Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. Part 2 defines an entity-based reference architecture comprising Observable Manufacturing Element (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, User Entity, and Functional Entities responsible for tasks such as actuation, data transformation, and user interfacing."
]
